title: ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. baeticum
intro: Ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. baeticum, also known as the Baetic Ornithogalum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Asparagaceae family, characterized by its strap-shaped leaves and white, star-shaped flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. baeticum include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
